title: geranium dissectum var. retrorsum
intro: Geranium dissectum var. retrorsum, also known as hardy geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant has been known to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving circulation, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be made to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
